prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年物理类最低位次约9029→11950→14370→13449→13804，整体呈后移趋势，近4年累计后移约4775名；2025年基准约13804名，较2024年略后移355名，显 示竞争持续加剧；本省物理类计划2021年31人，2022年32人，2023年31人，2024年34人，2025年35人；2026年计划38人，较2025年扩招3人，扩幅约8.6% ，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜约第82名（2026年），近年排名稳定在82-84名区间，学校综合实力与品牌认知度较高；2025年声誉偏正面（新闻传播学学科获评A++等级），2026年声誉偏负面（涉及宿舍火灾等校园安全事件），但整体关注度中等；抖音热度排名第11（高热），短视频 曝光量大，报考关注度较高；未见明显投档断档记录；新闻传播学A+（全国顶尖），与物理类部分招生专业（传播学、广告学、网络与新媒体等）相关；数字媒 体技术、人工智能、通信工程等工科专业依托学校传媒特色，就业方向明确。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类专业高热推荐，计算机类推荐，电气工程及其自动化高热 推荐，这些与物理类招生专业高度相关，专业热度较高；本省2026年物理类考生约34.7万人，较2025年32.02万人增加约8.4%，增幅小于历史类；省控线2025年405分，较2024年42 2分下降，整体分数线走低；该校位于北京，对湖南考生有较强地域吸引力；本校在湖南招生占比约2.5%（2024年数据），属中等水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 历年位次后移趋势、2026年物理类考生增加约8.4%而计划扩招约8.6%（供需基本平衡）、省控线下降等因素，预计2026年竞争与2025年基本持平但略加剧；学校声誉偏负面可能轻 微抑制热度，但相关工科专业热度较高形成支撑。预测最低位次约14534名，区间14034-15034名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间内（14034-15034名）建议以二档为主、一档冲刺、三档保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<14034名）可重点冲数字媒体技术、人工智能等热门工科专业；位次接近 区间上限（>15034名）建议以工商管理、数字经济保底。物理类考生可重点关注电子信息/通信类、计算机类专业，这些专业社会热度高、就业前景好，与中传的传媒特色结合具 有独特竞争力。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 9029 → 11950 → 14370 → 13449 → 13804, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 4775 places in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 13804, slightly shifting back by 355 places compared to 2024, indicating intensifying competition; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 31 in 2021, 32 in 2022, 31 in 2023, 34 in 2024, and 35 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 38, an increase of 3 students compared to 2025, an expansion of about 8.6%, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 82nd on the Soft Science Main Ranking (2026), with stable rankings in the 82-84 range in recent years, indicating strong comprehensive strength and brand recognition; reputation in 2025 was relatively positive (Journalism and Communication discipline rated A++), while in 2026 it was relatively negative (involving campus safety incidents such as dormitory fires), but overall attention is moderate; Douyin popularity ranking 11th (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable application attention; no obvious gaps in admission records; Journalism and Communication is A+ (top in the country), related to some Physics Category enrollment majors (Communication, Advertising, Network and New Media, etc.); engineering majors such as Digital Media Technology, Artificial Intelligence, and Communication Engineering leverage the university's media characteristics, with clear employment directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication majors are highly recommended, Computer majors are recommended, and Electrical Engineering and Automation is highly recommended, all highly relevant to Physics Category enrollment majors, with high major popularity; the number of Physics Category examinees in the province in 2026 is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from 320,200 in 2025, a smaller increase than the History Category; the provincial control line in 2025 was 405 points, down from 422 points in 2024, with an overall downward trend in scores; the university is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to Hunan examinees; the university's enrollment proportion in Hunan is about 2.5% (2024 data), at a moderate level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical backward trend in rankings, the increase in Physics Category examinees in 2026 by about 8.4% while the plan expands by about 8.6% (basically balanced supply and demand), and the decline in the provincial control line, competition in 2026 is expected to be roughly the same as in 2025 but slightly more intense; the negative reputation may slightly suppress enthusiasm, but the high popularity of related engineering majors provides support. The predicted minimum ranking is about 14534, with a range of 14034-15034.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Digital Media Technology
- Artificial Intelligence (Intelligent Audiovisual Excellence Talent Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Advertising (Computational Advertising Dual Bachelor's Degree Experimental Class)
- Digital Economy
- Business Administration (Intelligent Business Management Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range (14034-15034), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<14034), focus on popular engineering majors like Digital Media Technology and Artificial Intelligence; for rankings near the upper limit (>15034), it is recommended to use Business Administration and Digital Economy as safety options. Physics Category examinees can focus on Electronic Information/Communication and Computer majors, which have high social popularity and good employment prospects, combined with CUC's media characteristics for unique competitiveness.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category shifted from approximately 1056 → 1144 → 1566 → 1868 → 1832, showing an overall backward trend (increasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative backward shift of about 776 places over the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 1832, a slight rebound from 2024 (decrease of 36 places), indicating a slight easing of competition but still at a high level; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 11 in 2021-2022, increased to 13 in 2023, and to 17 in 2024-2025; the 2026 plan is 18, a small expansion of 1 person compared to 2025, an increase of about 5.9%, with limited effect on easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 82nd on the Soft Science main ranking (2026), with stable rankings in the 82-84 range in recent years, indicating strong overall strength and brand recognition; reputation was slightly positive in 2025 (Journalism and Communication discipline rated A++), but slightly negative in 2026 (involving campus safety incidents such as dormitory fires), though overall attention is moderate; Douyin popularity ranked 11th (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable application attention; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; Journalism and Communication is A+ (top in the country), highly matching the university's History Category enrollment majors (Network and New Media, Communication, Journalism, Advertising, etc.), with outstanding disciplinary advantages, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Journalism and Communication majors has noticeably discouraged applicants (the Zhang Xuefeng effect), but Communication University of China, as a top institution in this field, is relatively less affected; the province's 2026 History Category examinees are approximately 187,000, a significant increase of about 31% from 142,500 in 2025, sharply intensifying competition; the provincial control line in 2025 was 446 points, up from 438 points in 2024, with overall score lines rising; the university is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal for Hunan examinees; the university's enrollment proportion in Hunan is about 2.5% (2024 data), at a moderate level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical backward trend of rankings, the significant increase in 2026 History Category examinees (+31%) with only a 1-person expansion in the plan, and the rising provincial control line, competition in 2026 is expected to further intensify compared to 2025; at the same time, the slightly negative school reputation and the discouraging sentiment toward Journalism and Communication majors may mildly suppress enthusiasm. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1927, with a range of 1580-2274.

- Communication
- Network and New Media.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (1580-2274), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<1580), you can aim for flagship majors like Journalism and Communication; if your ranking is near the upper limit (>2274), it is advisable to use Cultural Industry Management as a safety. Although Journalism and Communication have social discouragement, CUC is the top institution in this field, with strong disciplinary strength and outstanding employment competitiveness.
